zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：弱势震荡延续偏空结构
zh.content:
当前AVAX/USD整体处于弱势震荡格局，价格6.74附近徘徊，未能有效站上SMA20均线6.89，短期趋势偏空但下跌动能有限。

MACD指标维持轻微负值，动能柱略向下扩散，说明短线空头仍占优势；成交未见放大，RSI缺失但从结构看处于中性偏弱区域。

下方关键支撑位于6.72前低区域，若失守或进一步下探；上方阻力集中在6.75短线压制及6.89 SMA20均线位置，突破才转强。

操作上建议以反弹做空为主，接近6.75-6.89区间分批布局空单，止损放在6.90上方，若跌破6.72可顺势追空但控制仓位。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD is currently exhibiting a mild bearish consolidation after a recent rejection from the short-term moving average cluster. Price action around 6.74 shows tight range compression with low volatility, indicating market indecision. The 24-hour performance is slightly negative, reinforcing lack of bullish momentum. Overall structure remains fragile, with price trading below the SMA(20) and forming lower highs.

Momentum indicators suggest continued weakness, with MACD reading at -0.028151440, signaling bearish pressure. Absence of a clear signal line value limits full crossover confirmation, but histogram bias remains negative. RSI data is unavailable, reducing precision in overbought or oversold assessment. However, price staying below SMA(20) at 6.89097 aligns with persistent downside momentum.

Immediate support is forming near the recent intraday low around 6.7249, which has acted as a short-term floor. A break below this level could expose further downside toward psychological support near 6.60. On the upside, initial resistance sits at 6.75, followed by stronger resistance at the SMA(20) near 6.89097. Price remains trapped in a narrow consolidation range, awaiting a directional breakout.

Traders may consider a cautious approach, prioritizing risk management given the lack of directional conviction. Short positions could be favored below 6.75 with confirmation of breakdown and volume support. Long entries should ideally wait for reclaim of SMA(20) to signal momentum recovery. Until breakout occurs, range-bound strategies between support and resistance may be more effective.
